summary: Frontend end-to-end validation of LindArt's 7 P0+P1 improvements via Playwright on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All 7 features pass: (1) AI loading phrases cycle correctly (ai-loading-phrase shows 'Misturando pigmentos cósmicos…' etc.); (2) new pieces present (chaveiro/prisma/cubo/sousplat/luminaria) across 3 categories (joalheria/decorativo/mesa); (3) 4 new luxury finishes visible under Luxo tab (pave-cristais/foil-dourado/holografico/espelhado); (4) LibrarySkeleton renders during /library load; (5) MockupShowcase renders 3 real images (clock/tray/geode) with 0 broken; (6) Calculator math validated for ratios 1:1, 2:1, 3:1 plus presets Pingente=8ml, Anel=2ml, pigment input working; (7) TrendingPalettes section present on Home. Navigation, mobile bottom nav, and Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI generation (~6s end-to-end with success indicator) all functional. Light Premium theme (cream/champagne/gold) confirmed visually.
action_items: MINOR (informational): Review request states routes are PT-BR (/biblioteca, /proporcoes, /tecnicas) but actual routes in App.js/Navbar.jsx are EN (/library, /calculator, /tips). Labels are PT-BR; only URL slugs are EN. If PT-BR slugs are desired for SEO/consistency, update App.js routes, Navbar links, and MobileNav links. Not a bug — feature works perfectly as implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: usePaletteStore.loadSaved sets loadingSaved=true on every mount; combined with React StrictMode dev double-invoke, the skeleton may flash twice in dev. Consider guarding with a 'hasLoadedOnce' flag.
Calculator.jsx imports FlaskConical but never uses it — dead import.
AIGenerator catches errors but discards the actual server message; consider surfacing err.response?.data?.detail in toast for easier debugging.
Calculator.jsx 'mode' state is declared but never read (only volume mode is rendered). Dead state or feature stub — clarify.
LibrarySkeleton uses inline animation style with `pulse 1.6s` and a custom `shimmer-sweep` class; verify the class is defined in index.css (otherwise the shimmer overlay is a no-op).
MOCKUPS unsplash/emergentagent CDN URLs have no fallback; if the CDN is down the cards show empty area with only the gradient overlay. Consider an `onError` fallback to a local placeholder.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: AI generation created one transient palette (Cristal Dourado Oceânico) via POST /api/ai/generate-palette during test; not persisted to /api/palettes (only saved if user clicks Salvar). No cleanup needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Routes are EN slugs with PT-BR labels (/, /studio, /library, /calculator, /tips). Use these for Playwright nav. All critical data-testids validated: app-root, navbar, mobile-nav, nav-link-{studio|library|calculator|tips}, mockup-{clock|tray|geode}, mockup-showcase, ai-generator, ai-prompt-input, ai-generate-btn, ai-loading-phrase, piece-cat-{joalheria|decorativo|mesa}, piece-{chaveiro|prisma|cubo|sousplat|luminaria|...}, style-tab-{classico|luxo}, style-{pave-cristais|foil-dourado|holografico|espelhado}, library-page, library-skeleton, lib-filter-{todos|favoritos|ai|user}, calculator-page, calc-volume-input, calc-pigment-input, calc-ratio-{1:1|2:1|3:1}, calc-preset-{Pingente|Brinco par|Anel|Coaster|Bandeja média|Quadro grande}, result-{resin|hardener|pigment}. AI call latency ~6s with Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All 7 P0+P1 improvements verified working end-to-end.
